title: Viewer live bounds + fit fix
description:
PDF Viewer scroll/grey box now uses live page stack bounds (not stale DOM height from map layout). Fit-to-width syncs bounds before zoom; mount reflows stack first. Wider crop detection (Art/Bleed boxes).

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg69).
changeLog: Sync world bounds before fit — removes oversized grey scroll area.
Viewport zoom reads live stack height/width from page data.
Viewer mount reflows stack then fits.
12px fit inset + Art/Bleed box auto-trim on import.
